Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microscopes can see video on a laserdisc 544 upvotes, 74 comments
  2. Z80 Sans – a disassembler in a font (2024) 139 upvotes, 14 comments
  3. FrameBook 480 upvotes, 79 comments
  4. Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life 142 upvotes, 20 comments
  5. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 692 upvotes, 163 comments
  6. PCB devboard the size of a USB-C plug 229 upvotes, 52 comments
  7. Linux Internals: How /proc/self/mem writes to unwritable memory (2021) 108 upvotes, 23 comments
  8. FreeBSD Capsicum vs. Linux Seccomp Process Sandboxing 29 upvotes, 4 comments
  9. Reverse-engineering the UniFi inform protocol 34 upvotes, 6 comments
  10. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 197 upvotes, 62 comments
  11. Segagaga Has Been Translated into English 46 upvotes, 11 comments
  12. Fontcrafter: Turn Your Handwriting into a Real Font 208 upvotes, 76 comments
  13. How the Sriracha guys screwed over their supplier 318 upvotes, 135 comments
  14. I made a programming language with M&Ms 104 upvotes, 38 comments
  15. The Window Chrome of Our Discontent 50 upvotes, 16 comments
  16. Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025) 400 upvotes, 203 comments
  17. FFmpeg at Meta: Media Processing at Scale 69 upvotes, 29 comments
  18. WSL Manager 123 upvotes, 60 comments
  19. Show HN: VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer 44 upvotes, 19 comments
  20. Unlocking Python's Cores:Energy Implications of Removing the GIL 68 upvotes, 34 comments
  21. My Homelab Setup 293 upvotes, 192 comments
  22. The death of social media is the renaissance of RSS (2025) 199 upvotes, 130 comments
  23. Why can't you tune your guitar? (2019) 232 upvotes, 161 comments
  24. Ask HN: How to be alone? 578 upvotes, 436 comments
  25. We should revisit literate programming in the agent era 269 upvotes, 199 comments
  26. US Court of Appeals: TOS may be updated by email, use can imply consent [pdf] 371 upvotes, 288 comments
  27. The Finger and the Moon 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video] 226 upvotes, 222 comments
  29. My “grand vision” for Rust 239 upvotes, 248 comments
  30. Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (March 2026) 224 upvotes, 778 comments

Last generated 11:00pm, 9 March 2026. Source here.
